items.name: karpathy/autoresearch
items.title: The Scholar's Compass
items.description: Autonomous research agent that iteratively searches academic databases, reads papers, extracts findings, and produces structured research summaries.

items.name: devin-ai/autonomous-swe
items.title: The Codebreaker's Will
items.description: Autonomous software engineering agent that combines debugging, code generation, and self-correction to resolve issues end-to-end across complex multi-file repositories.

items.name: laravel/upgrade-laravel-v13
items.title: The Versionist's Trial
items.description: Guides an AI agent through upgrading a Laravel 12 application to Laravel 13 safely, covering breaking changes, dependency updates, and post-upgrade validation.

items.name: anthropic/skill-creator
items.title: The Skill Forger's Art
items.description: Interviews the user to elicit skill purpose and steps, then programmatically writes a new SKILL.md file for Claude Code or Codex CLI.

items.name: vercel/find-skills
items.title: The Registry Scout
items.description: Searches the skills.sh registry by keyword, ranks by install count, and auto-installs the chosen skill.

items.name: glincker/readme-generator
items.title: The Document Weaver
items.description: Analyzes project structure, manifests, and configs to generate a professional README.md with badges, install steps, and usage examples.

items.name: anthropic/pptx
items.title: The Slide Artisan
items.description: Extracts, edits, and repacks PowerPoint (.pptx) files using markitdown, enabling agents to read, modify, and write structured presentations without a GUI.

items.name: addy-osmani/test-driven-development
items.title: The Red-Green Oath
items.description: Forces a strict red-green-refactor TDD workflow, blocking code generation that skips the test step and enforcing coverage thresholds.

items.name: martin-stepanoski/nielsen-heuristics-audit
items.title: The Ten Laws of Sight
items.description: Audits a UI against Jakob Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics, scores each, and produces a prioritized remediation report.

items.name: ruvnet/flow-nexus-swarm
items.title: The Grand Conductor's Blueprint
items.description: Cloud-based AI swarm orchestration supporting hierarchical, mesh, ring, and star topologies with event-driven workflows and intelligent agent assignment.

items.name: gooseworks/notte-browser
items.title: The Digital Navigator
items.description: AI-first browser automation using the Notte Browser API for session control, page scraping, form filling, and autonomous web agent execution.

items.name: yonatangross/orchestkit-rag
items.title: The Knowledge Architect
items.description: Production-grade RAG retrieval skill covering 30+ patterns: HyDE, pgvector hybrid search, cross-encoder reranking, multimodal chunking, and agentic self-RAG and corrective-RAG loops.

items.name: upsonic/unittest-generator
items.title: The Test Weaver
items.description: Autonomous Claude agent that generates comprehensive unittest.TestCase suites from source code, organised into concept-based subfolders.

items.name: 0xdarkmatter/pytest-patterns
items.title: The Quality Guardian
items.description: Comprehensive pytest skill covering fixtures, parametrize, async testing, mocking, coverage strategies, and integration test patterns for pytest 7.0+ projects.

items.name: spring-ai/readme-generate
items.title: The Endpoint Scribe
items.description: Scans a Java Spring project for controller annotations, extracts REST API endpoint definitions, and generates structured API documentation in README format.

items.name: mattpocock/diagnose
items.title: The Disciplined Diagnosis Loop
items.description: Enforces a five-phase debugging discipline prioritising the feedback loop above all else — refuses to proceed until a fast deterministic pass/fail signal exists.

items.name: mattpocock/tdd
items.title: Vertical-Slice TDD
items.description: Enforces strict vertical-slice TDD, blocking horizontal slicing (all tests first, then all code) and requiring tests against public interfaces only.

items.name: mattpocock/zoom-out
items.title: The Abstraction Lift
items.description: Signals the agent to ascend one layer of abstraction and produce a map of all relevant modules, callers, and domain-glossary terms.

items.name: mattpocock/edit-article
items.title: The Section-by-Section Rewrite
items.description: Edits articles by modelling them as a DAG of information dependencies, confirming section order, then rewriting each section with a 240-character-per-paragraph constraint.

items.name: mattpocock/write-a-skill
items.title: The Skill Scaffolder
items.description: Guides creation of new agent skills via structured interview, producing a SKILL.md with trigger-aware description, progressive-disclosure layout, and optional bundled scripts.

items.name: mattpocock/triage
items.title: The State-Machine Triager
items.description: Moves GitHub issues through a two-category x five-state machine with bug reproduction, agent-brief writing, and structured triage notes bearing an AI-generation disclaimer.

items.name: mattpocock/to-prd
items.title: The PRD Synthesiser
items.description: Synthesises conversation context and codebase knowledge into a fully-structured PRD with user stories, implementation decisions, and testing decisions, then publishes to the issue tracker.

items.name: mattpocock/to-issues
items.title: The Vertical Slicer
items.description: Breaks a plan into independently-demoable vertical slices, classifies each HITL or AFK, maps dependency chains, and publishes structured GitHub issues with acceptance criteria in dependency order.

items.name: mattpocock/grill-with-docs
items.title: The Domain Sovereign
items.description: Stress-tests a plan against the project's domain model, challenging language against CONTEXT.md, cross-referencing code, and persisting resolved decisions as inline glossary updates and ADRs.

items.name: mattpocock/grill-me
items.title: The Relentless Interviewer
items.description: Conducts a relentless one-question-at-a-time interview walking every branch of the decision tree with a recommended answer, substituting codebase exploration wherever empirically determinable.

items.name: mattpocock/ubiquitous-language
items.title: The Domain Linguist
items.description: Extracts and formalises a project's domain terminology into a shared glossary, enforcing consistent naming across code and conversations to eliminate ambiguity.

items.name: mattpocock/improve-codebase-architecture
items.title: The Depth Seeker
items.description: Identifies shallow modules via the deletion test, presents deepening opportunities with locality/leverage analysis, then grills the developer on the chosen candidate to design a deep-module replacement.

items.name: huggingface/hf-cli
items.title: The Hub Operator
items.description: Guides Hugging Face Hub CLI operations for downloading, uploading, managing repos, running Jobs, querying datasets, configuring Spaces, and handling Hub authentication.

items.name: huggingface/huggingface-datasets
items.title: The Dataset Cartographer
items.description: Explores Hugging Face datasets through the Dataset Viewer API, resolving configs and splits, previewing rows, paginating records, searching text, filtering rows, and retrieving parquet metadata.

items.name: huggingface/huggingface-llm-trainer
items.title: The Cloud Fine-Tuner
items.description: Runs LLM fine-tuning on Hugging Face Jobs using TRL or Unsloth, covering SFT, DPO, GRPO, reward modeling, dataset validation, hardware selection, Trackio monitoring, and Hub persistence.

items.name: huggingface/huggingface-vision-trainer
items.title: The Vision Forge
items.description: Trains and fine-tunes object detection, image classification, and SAM/SAM2 segmentation models on Hugging Face Jobs or locally with dataset validation, metrics, Trackio, and Hub persistence.

items.name: huggingface/huggingface-papers
items.title: The Paper Indexer
items.description: Looks up Hugging Face paper pages and arXiv IDs, fetching markdown paper content and structured metadata such as authors, linked models, datasets, Spaces, GitHub repos, and project pages.

items.name: huggingface/transformers-js
items.title: The Browser Modelwright
items.description: Runs Hugging Face Transformers.js models directly in JavaScript and TypeScript across browser and server runtimes for NLP, vision, audio, and multimodal inference with WebGPU or WASM.
